song.title: 293 - 神啊你名何等广大泱漭
song.lyrics:
[V1] 神啊,你名何等广大泱漭! Deep down into the depths of this Thy Name, 我今投身其中,心顶安然; My God, I sink and dwell in calm delight;
有你够了,无论日有多长; Thou art enough however long the day, 有你够了,无论夜有多暗。 Thou art enough however dark the night.
[V2] 有你够了,无论事多纷烦; Thou art enough however endless the tears, 有你够了,无论境多寂寞; Thou art enough however deep the solitude; 有你,我就已经能够尽欢, Thou art enough my joy abounds, 有你,我就已经能够唱歌。 Thou art enough my heart can sing joyfully.
[V3] 你是我神!全有!全足!全丰! Thou art my God—the All-Sufficient One, 你能为我创造我所缺乏; Thou canst create for me whate’er I lack; 有你自己,在我回家途中, Thy mighty hand has strewn the lonely track 无论有何需要,都必无差。 With miracles of love and tender care
[V4] 我的神啊,你在已过路上, For me Thy trusting one. My God I dare 曾用爱的神迹多方眷顾; Once more to fling myself upon Thy breast, 故我敢再投入你的胸膛, And there adore Thy ways in faith’s deep rest, 因信心安,赞美你的道路。 And there adore Thy ways in faith’s quiet rest
